492 Hill St

events.description: An Evening of Magic with Dennis Watkins Friday, July 24 Two Shows: 5:30 pm & 8:00 pm Town Square Ballroom & Jury Bar | Green Lake, WI Prepare to be amazed when award-winning magician and mentalist Dennis Watkins brings an unforgettable evening of magic to Town Square. A third-generation magician known for his critically acclaimed show The Magic Parlour in Chicago, Watkins delivers a dazzling mix of sleight-of-hand, mind-reading, storytelling, and humor that keeps audiences on the edge of their seats. This intimate live performance puts the magic right in front of you—sometimes even in your own hands—as impossible moments unfold just inches away. Watkins’ performances blend classic magic with modern wit, creating an interactive experience that will leave you laughing, questioning reality, and rediscovering a sense of childlike wonder. Whether you’re a longtime fan of magic or simply looking for a unique night out, this is a show you won’t want to miss.

events.description: This is fun for the WHOLE family with prizes galore, concessions, and lots of surprises. It’s a fun party for the young and young at heart!* Follow us on Facebook for the most up-to-date jackpot info. We play 13 games, plus speedy bingo and progressive black-out final game. It’s a WIN-WIN!

events.description: Daniel Van Kirk's comedy is a unifying force. His live performances are a testament to why he's recognized as a "Comic To Watch" by Comedy Central. With a captivating stage presence, Daniel forges a genuine connection with his audience, fostering honesty, sincerity, and uproarious laughter. His comedic prowess leaves an indelible mark on fans, who carry those hilarious memories long after the show's curtain falls. You might recognize him from appearances on Bob's Burgers, The NFL Network, or The UCB Show. Additionally, he co-hosts the popular podcasts Dumb People Town and Pen Pals, where his humor shines. Originally from Rochelle, IL, and having spent his formative adult years in Chicago, his unique comedic style is a product of his upbringing, creating a one-of-a-kind comedic experience that resonates with audiences far and wide.

events.title: WINE WALK
events.location: Downtown Green Lake
events.description: Dust off those leg warmers, tease up that hair, and get ready to party like it's the '80s! 🪩🍷🎶 The Green Lake Area Chamber of Commerce is excited to host the Fourth Annual Taste & Tunes Wine Walk on Friday, August 7, 2026, from 4:30 PM – 8:00 PM in Downtown Green Lake. Neon everywhere, live tunes, great wine, and big hair are taking over Downtown Green Lake for one unforgettable evening. Participating businesses will be serving a variety of unique wine samples while embracing this year's all-out '80s theme. Stop locations and entertainment details will be announced closer to the event. 🎟️ Tickets go on sale Thursday, June 11 at 12:00 PM. Your ticket includes: 🍷 A variety of unique wine samples at participating stops 🥤 A custom Green Lake Wine Walk tumbler, sponsored by Solara Aevum Wellness & Aesthetics 👜 The first 70 registrations will receive a FREE 2025 Wine Walk tote bag Throw on your best '80s attire, call up your friends, and get ready to stroll from stop to stop as our decked-out businesses bring the decade to life. From unique wine samples and live tunes to shopping and plenty of throwback fun, it's sure to be an unforgettable summer evening in Downtown Green Lake. Must be 21 years of age or older to attend. Tickets are non-refundable.

events.description: Start your month with coffee, community, and conversations that care for Green Lake. Come by, stay awhile, and start your Friday with community and clean water in mind.

events.description: Join the Green Lake Association for an extraordinary evening of community, connection, and celebration at The Lake Ball, presented by Craig & Katie Culver. Seating is limited, so please reserve your seats online today at https://www.greenlakeassociation.org/lakeball2026. events.description: Green Lake Area 13dot1 Races – Half Marathon, 10K & 5K Kick off Labor Day Weekend in scenic Green Lake with your choice of a Half Marathon, 10K, or 5K —all starting and finishing at the Town Square Community Center Terrace. Our race courses wind through historic downtown, past local shops and parks, and along the breathtaking shoreline of Big Green Lake. Runners will enjoy a mix of charming neighborhoods, lakefront vistas, and wooded pathways, with the Half Marathon featuring an extended tour through the beautiful Green Lake Conference Center grounds. All routes offer family-friendly fun, community spirit, and memorable views, ending back at Town Square for post-race celebrations.
